response.justification: Bogdan has strong full-stack engineering experience, open-source leadership, and exposure to event-driven systems and AI-agent tooling, but lacks demonstrable production-scale multi-agent AI architecture in fintech, regulatory compliance experience, and evidence of scaling engineering teams beyond 10 people — critical gaps for a CTO role in high-stakes agentic AI fintech.
strengths: Hands-on experience with agentic workflows and MCP frameworks at re:cinq
Proven track record building event-driven, scalable systems (GISCollective, DLang microservices)
Strong engineering culture advocacy via workshops, TDD, CI/CD, and open-source leadership
concerns: No explicit evidence of designing or operating multi-agent AI systems in regulated fintech environments
Lacks demonstrated experience scaling engineering teams from 10 to 30+ or governing hybrid external engineering models
No mention of real-time credit risk, working-capital algorithms, or financial compliance infrastructure
